ocr_findings.description: The character 岐 (as in 損益分岐点) is consistently rendered as 歧 throughout the OCR output (appears 4+ times: '損益分歧点'). Image clearly shows 岐 (U+5C90). OCR produces 歧 (U+6B67) — a visually similar but incorrect kanji. This is a systematic wrong_char error affecting the key term for this entire page.
Graph at bottom rendered as img placeholder (img-0.jpeg). Axis labels '750,000', '500,000', '2,500個', '販売個数', 'y=300x', 'y=100x+500,000' in the graph figure are not captured in OCR text.
学習のポイント icon/mascot image rendered as img placeholder (img-1.jpeg) — non-text decorative element, no text loss.

reviewer_notes: Breakeven calculation worked example page (Lesson 01-07). The systematic 岐→歧 kanji substitution is the main concern — the term '損益分岐点' is the page's core topic and is misspelled in every instance. Mathematical equations and prose are otherwise accurately captured. The section header in the OCR also reads '損益分歧点' matching the body error pattern.
